cast.name: 薇蕾娜·阿尔顿布格尔 Verena Altenberger
托马斯·舒伯特 Thomas Schubert

director.name: 多米尼克·格拉夫 Dominik Graf

introduction: Elisabeth "Bessie" Eyckhoff, who has recently moved to the Munich Homicide Commission as Chief Detective Officer, is immediately confronted with a tricky case. She has arrested a suspected serial killer, everything speaks for his guilt, but the evidence is missing. She needs a confession to pull the dangerous perpetrator out of circulation until midnight, otherwise the judges will release him. The accused is highly intelligent, the team's nerves are on edge, an interrogation specialist is called in. And Eyckhoff has to fight until the last minute .
